nasb.text: Leave out the court which is outside the temple and do not measure it, for it has been given to the nations; and they will tread under foot the holy city for forty-two months.

esv.text: but do not measure the court outside the temple; leave that out, for it is given over to the nations, and they will trample the holy city for forty-two months.

cnv.text: 但聖所外面的院子，不要量它，因為它已經給了外族人，他們要踐踏聖城四十二個月。

ccb.text: 你不用量圣殿的外院，因为这部分已经给了外族人，他们要践踏圣城四十二个月。

csbs.text: 不过要排除圣所外面的院子，不要测量它，因为那里已经给了外邦人。外邦人将要践踏圣城四十二个月。
